Wallet List
components.description: Provide the list of wallets from where you are going to be funding

validate.customMessage: Please provide a valid wallet address for the selected blockchain type.

components.label: HTML
components.content:
Wallet Information

Only wallets that have been authorized may hold the tokens from this fund. After this wallet has been screened, the tokens will be issued to this wallet by default. Additional wallets can be added via the platform or Investor Support.

components.label: Address
components.calculateValue: var wallets = JSON.parse(data.walletListRaw || '[]'); var match = wallets.find(function(w) { return w.address === data.selectedEvmWallet; }); value = match ? match.address : '';
